title: Identify and mark livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and mark livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to identify and mark animals

pcs.text: Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary.

pcs.text: Prepare and use equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare materials and preventative health treatments, and ensure adequate quantities for required task according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Identify, clean and prepare sites and facilities for marking
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, clean and prepare sites and facilities for marking?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, clean and prepare sites and facilities for marking.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment, materials or PPE to supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment, materials or PPE to supervisor.

elements.title: Identify and mark animals
